title: senecio subcanescens
intro: Senecio subcanescens, also known as woolly groundsel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, helping to relieve respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio subcanescens include its potential to treat coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory problems, as well as its ability to improve digestion and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of Senecio subcanescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
